title: Epiphany Swarm Control Receipt
description: Generic receipt emitted after a coordinator-owned Epiphany control action. The receipt names the authority that made the final yes/no decision, the transport that carried the order, and any host executor that gathered facts or performed side effects.

decisionOwner.description: Authority that made the final yes/no verdict. For Epiphany-owned launch and reorientation flows this is epiphany-core, not the transport bridge.

transportRole.description: What the Epiphany-Codex transport bridge did for this action. Expected values are translateCultNetToCodexJson, translateCodexJsonToCultNet, carryOrder, carryReceipt, or a '+' joined combination. It must not make the launch/reorient verdict, gather host facts, or execute side effects.

hostExecutorRole.description: Host-side executor role that gathered facts or performed side effects after the core/coordinator verdict, when such an executor exists.

hostFacts.description: Host/runtime facts gathered by the host executor before execution, expressed as readable labels or artifact refs rather than private context.

sideEffects.description: Side effects the host executor performed after the core/coordinator verdict.
